hooks.command: raw=$(cat); msg=$(echo "$raw" | jq -r '.message // .prompt // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo "$raw"); if echo "$msg" | grep -qE 'opsx:explore'; then echo 'Explore' > .openspec-state; elif echo "$msg" | grep -qE 'opsx:propose'; then echo 'Propose' > .openspec-state; elif echo "$msg" | grep -qE 'opsx:apply'; then echo 'Apply' > .openspec-state; elif echo "$msg" | grep -qE 'opsx:archive'; then echo 'Archive' > .openspec-state; elif echo "$msg" | grep -qE 'opsx:sync'; then echo 'Sync' > .openspec-state; fi
